roa.docketEntryComment: PET & ORDER TO SUSP FEE PER SFBOS 180132 SIGNED AND FILED

/TWS/CH3 DEFT TO PAY $50 TOTAL BASE FINE/CTORD DEFT TO PAY $50 TOTAL BASEFINE & FEES TO AMOUNT OF $270; & DEFT TO PAY 1 LUMP SUM PAYMENT ON OR BEFORE 01-25-16 IN ROOM 101, FAILURE TO DO SO MAY SUBJECT THE DEFENDANT TO A $300 CIVIL ASSESSMENT/VF2:150/COA:40/ICNA/OBEY/
